|                                                     |           |
|-----------------------------------------------------|----------:|
| **ITAM**                                            |           |
| *Principles of Microeconomics* - Bachelor (Spanish) | Fall 2025 |

|  |  |
|--------------------------------------------------------|---------------:|
| **IMSS** |  |
| [*Statistical tools in R*](https://estebandegetau.com/Statistical-tools-in-R) *-* Office Training (Spanish) | Spring 2025 |
